scripts.desktop:bundle: npm run backend:bundle && npm run desktop:tauri:build
scripts.backend:check: PYTHONPATH=apps/backend ./.venv/bin/python -c "from app.main import app; print(app.title, len(app.routes))"
scripts.validate:backend: npm run backend:check && npm run backend:test && npm run backend:smoke && npm run backend:openapi
scripts.validate:release: npm run validate:backend && npm run desktop:build && npm run backend:bundle && npm run desktop:tauri:build
